TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Namisan, title = Namisan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Namisan} }

S.FORM: alang Namisan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 76 buwan, 187 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 47% kyan ku 87 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 53% kyan ku 100 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 46%, Paywan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Namisan hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Namisan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Namisan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Namisan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Namisan hya' ga Afih. tay mkyahu' na Namisan hya' ga Angcoh. tay 'zil na Namisan hya' ga Cinemnemay. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Namisan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Namisan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Namisan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 76 buwan, 187 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 47% kyan ku 87 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 53% kyan ku 100 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 46%, Paywan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Namisan hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Namisan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Namisan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Namisan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Namisan hya' ga Afih. tay mkyahu' na Namisan hya' ga Angcoh. tay 'zil na Namisan hya' ga Cinemnemay. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Namisan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Namisan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ namis~ɕan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βuri ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na namis~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na namis~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na namis~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na namis~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na namis~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa a*iħ. taj mkjaħuʔ na namis~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa aŋʦ~ʨoħ. taj ʔzil na namis~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨinemnemaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ namis~ɕan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ namis~ɕan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
